loadGridTooltip: Open the custom maze data loading interface
loadGraphTooltip: Open the custom graph data loading interface
resetTooltip: Clear all data and restore the initial state
noGraphData: No graph data is currently available. Unable to specify a start/end node.
startOutOfRange: Start index {{s}} is out of range (0 ~ {{maxIndex}})
startIsWall: Start index {{s}} is a wall and cannot be traversed
endOutOfRange: End index {{e}} is out of range (0 ~ {{maxIndex}})
endIsWall: End index {{e}} is a wall and cannot be traversed
